channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Law enforcement freezes $41M connected to $150M crypto Ponzi collapse
item.description: BG Wealth Sharing, according to authorities, claimed to provide guidance on crypto trading, advertised heavily on social media and offered “daily profit opportunities.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: a16z raises $2.2B for new fund backing stablecoins, prediction markets
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz’s crypto investment arm said its new fund would seek to back projects that “people keep using when the hype fades.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Anchorage launches agentic banking as CEO tips ‘trillion-dollar’ opportunity
item.description: Anchorage’s new product enables AI agents to have compliant access to capital across traditional finance and crypto payment rails.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brian Quarmby

item.title: Colombian president says Bitcoin mining could transform country's Caribbean coast
item.description: The Colombian president pointed to the impact Bitcoin mining has had in Paraguay, which is now the fourth-largest Bitcoin mining country by hashrate.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Kelp DAO to migrate rsETH to Chainlink CCIP as blame game continues
item.description: Bryan Pellegrino, co-founder and CEO of LayerZero, disputed Kelp DAO’s accusations and said a postmortem by external security firms will be published soon.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Iggy Azalea faces class lawsuit over MOTHER memecoin
item.description: A class-action group has accused rapper Iggy Azalea of not following through on delivering utility and business integrations for her memecoin, Mother Iggy.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Strategy could sell Bitcoin ‘to inoculate the market,’ Michael Saylor says
item.description: It marks the first time that Saylor’s company has floated the idea of selling Bitcoin, parting ways with his long-held view that Bitcoin shouldn’t be sold.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin holds $81K amid flat derivatives markets: Is rally sustainable?
item.description: Bitcoin carved a path toward $82,000, but derivatives metrics need another push from bulls to sustain the rally.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Forward Industries, RockawayX back OnRe to build onchain reinsurance on Solana
item.description: Investors back a model that moves insurance risk and capital flows onto blockchain rails, as onchain reinsurance looks to attract institutional participation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Ripple CEO says market structure bill not ‘done deal,’ despite compromise
item.description: Brad Garlinghouse addressed attendees at a Tuesday crypto conference on the progress of the CLARITY Act after US lawmakers announced a compromise on stablecoin yield that could advance the legislation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Prophet launches AI-powered prediction market with live $10,000 trading tranche
item.description: Prophet, an AI-native prediction market platform, has launched its first live trading tranche, introducing a system where an AI model acts as the counterparty to user trades using real capital.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Bitcoin short liquidations push BTC to multi-month highs: Is $90K next?
item.description: Short liquidations and rising open interest may be signs of the bulls’ plan to push the Bitcoin price closer to $90,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Crypto PAC spends $500K in support of Indiana candidate ahead of primary
item.description: Days before Indiana’s primary election, the Defend American Jobs PAC disclosed roughly $514,000 in media spending supporting a Republican incumbent in the state’s 4th Congressional District.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Tennessee Bankers Association names Stablecore as preferred digital asset provider
item.description: Regional lenders gain access to infrastructure for stablecoins, tokenized deposits and crypto-backed lending without building systems in-house, signaling wider bank adoption.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index turns neutral for first time since January: Is $100K BTC next?
item.description: Improving investor confidence supports Bitcoin’s hold on $80,000, as the Crypto Fear and Greed Index exited the “Extreme Fear” zone and now reads “neutral.” Are the bulls back in control?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: US prosecutors ask for leniency for ex-Celsius exec, citing cooperation
item.description: While Roni Cohen-Pavon’s lawyers requested time served, US prosecutors stopped short of recommending a specific sentence, instead urging the judge to consider federal sentencing guidelines.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bernstein cites $4T tokenized credit opportunity for Figure Technology stock
item.description: Bernstein points to Figure’s expansion beyond home equity lending into blockchain-based credit as tokenization begins to scale across broader loan markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: XRP price copies 2025 chart fractal that last time sparked 66% gains
item.description: XRP price broke out of a multi-month bull flag, while other chart technicals are also supporting more upside in the near term.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Kaiko flags possible front-running before Robinhood token listings
item.description: Kaiko said open interest, funding rates and wallet activity showed repeated pre-announcement positioning before several Robinhood token listings.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Space and Time rolls out virtual vaults for institutional onchain lending
item.description: The data blockchain securing onchain finance projects looks to provide lenders and borrowers with agreement-specific collateral solution.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Robert Lakin

item.title: Binance changes weekend pricing for commodity TradFi futures
item.description: Binance will shift to an orderbook-weighted pricing model for commodity perpetual futures during off-hours, potentially changing margin and liquidation behavior.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce, citing market slump and AI shift
item.description: Brian Armstrong said Coinbase will flatten management layers and require leaders to work as “player-coaches” under the new structure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin ‘supercycle’ or bear-market rally? BTC breaking $81K has traders at odds
item.description: Bitcoin bottom calls grow as analysts target $180,000–$250,000 within a year, fueling debate over whether BTC has resumed its broader bull cycle.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Crypto products post 5th straight week of inflows despite mid-week selloff
item.description: Crypto ETPs shed $619 million over four days before a $737 million Friday session rescued the week, extending the inflow streak to $4.02 billion across five weeks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
item.description: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bullish to buy transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2B in tokenization push
item.description: Bullish has agreed to acquire transfer agent Equiniti as more Wall Street participants accelerate their tokenization initiatives to offer 24/7 trading.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Dutch users still access prediction markets despite Polymarket ban
item.description: Polymarket was banned in the Netherlands in February, but Kalshi, Hyperliquid and Interactive Brokers are still offering prediction markets to Dutch users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin taps $81K as long-term holders add 330K BTC: How high can price go?
item.description: Accumulation by long-term Bitcoin holders, buying by institutional investors and a strengthening technical structure could fuel BTC’s price rise to $95,000 or higher.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: UAE free zone launches blockchain-based business IDs for registered firms
item.description: Innovation City launches a blockchain-based business ID system, giving more than 1,000 firms verifiable onchain credentials for identity and access.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben
